creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
I am getting an error on filesize when I download the source.

Fetched file size mismatch (expected 522832, actual 8356)
=> Trying next site
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.csie.ntu.edu.tw/~cjlin/liblinear/oldfiles/liblinear-2.11.zip
fetch: http://www.csie.ntu.edu.tw/~cjlin/liblinear/oldfiles/liblinear-2.11.zip: size unknown
fetch: http://www.csie.ntu.edu.tw/~cjlin/liblinear/oldfiles/liblinear-2.11.zip: size of remote file is not known
liblinear-2.11.zip                                       0  B    0  Bps
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 522832, actual 8367)
=> Trying next site
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/liblinear-2.11.zip
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/liblinear-2.11.zip: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1


Can you please verify this? thanks!
